Document:
# Race Comparison
Each playable race in OpenEdge 14 starts with different base stats, reflecting their unique strengths. Some races are min-max designs, excelling at specific stats while sacrificing others.
## Comparison Table
| Race | STR | VIT | DEX | INT | Free Skills | Playstyle | |------|-----|-----|-----|-----|-------------|-----------| | Human | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 | None (+3 points) | Flexible | | Elf | 6 | 6 | 1 | 7 | Metamagic T1/T2 | Mage | | Dwarf | 7 | 7 | 2 | 4 | Alcohol Resistance | Warrior | | Goblin | 6 | 6 | 7 | 1 | Athletic T1/T2 | Agile | | Silva | 1 | 7 | 5 | 7 | Healing T1/T2 | Tank/Healer | | Carcat | 5 | 5 | 7 | 3 | Electromancy T1/T2 | Swift | | Tiefling | 7 | 5 | 2 | 6 | Pyrokinetic T1/T2 | Destroyer |
---
## Race Details
### Human — The Flexible Choice
[bold]STR 5 · VIT 5 · DEX 5 · INT 5[/bold]
No racial abilities, but gain [bold]3 bonus creation points[/bold] instead of 1. Can be built into any role.
### Elf — The Mage
[bold]STR 6 · VIT 6 · DEX 1 · INT 7[/bold]
Get [bold]Metamagic T1 and T2[/bold] for free — reduces mana cost and gains +2 effective INT. DEX 1 means they fall easily when hit.
### Dwarf — The Warrior
[bold]STR 7 · VIT 7 · DEX 2 · INT 4[/bold]
Have [bold]alcohol resistance[/bold] — certain drinks that poison other races heal the Dwarf. Very slow due to low DEX, but the most physically durable.
### Goblin — The Agile
[bold]STR 6 · VIT 6 · DEX 7 · INT 1[/bold]
Get [bold]Athletic T1 and T2[/bold] for free — gain +2 effective DEX. INT 1 means almost no mana: practically no access to magic.
### Silva — The Tank/Healer
[bold]STR 1 · VIT 7 · DEX 5 · INT 7[/bold]
Get [bold]Healing T1 and T2[/bold] for free — gain +2 effective VIT. STR 1 makes melee combat nearly unviable, but they have strong magic and high health.
### Carcat — The Swift
[bold]STR 5 · VIT 5 · DEX 7 · INT 3[/bold]
Get [bold]Electromancy T1 and T2[/bold] for free — gain +2 effective DEX. Balanced in physical combat with excellent mobility. Limited magic.
### Tiefling — The Destroyer
[bold]STR 7 · VIT 5 · DEX 2 · INT 6[/bold]
Get [bold]Pyrokinetic T1 and T2[/bold] for free — gain +2 effective STR. Combine physical strength with fire magic. Low DEX leaves them vulnerable to knockdown.
---
## Stat Effects
[bold]Strength[/bold] — physical damage. STR 5 = 1.0x, STR 10 = 1.5x damage.
[bold]Vitality[/bold] — max health. VIT 5 = 100 HP, each point = +12.5 HP.
[bold]Dexterity[/bold] — stamina. Low DEX = knocked down easily in combat.
[bold]Intelligence[/bold] — mana. INT 5 = 100 mana, each point = +25 mana.
---
## Choosing Your Race
- [bold]Want to cast spells?[/bold] Elf (INT 9 effective) or Silva (INT 9 effective). - [bold]Want melee combat?[/bold] Tiefling (STR 9 effective) or Dwarf. - [bold]Want speed and mobility?[/bold] Goblin (DEX 9 effective) or Carcat (DEX 9 effective). - [bold]Want to customize freely?[/bold] Human — 3 extra points to distribute however you want.
